footer.description: Equipment rental between neighbors. Smart resourcefulness, neighborhood warmth.

home.title: Rent or lend equipment between neighbors
home.subtitle: Smart resourcefulness, neighborhood warmth. Find or offer tools near you, simply and with confidence.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to rent or offer equipment
home.step1Description: Browse tools available in your neighborhood or share yours in a few clicks.
home.step2Description: Exchange directly with your neighbor via our messaging system to organize the rental or loan.
home.step3Description: Hand-to-hand exchange between neighbors. You arrange directly, with simplicity and trust.
home.toolsForProjectsSubtitle: DIY, gardening, events... Find the equipment you need near you
home.whySimpleDescription: No hidden fees, no intermediary. You discuss directly with your neighbor.
home.whyNeighborhoodDescription: Find tools in your neighborhood, between neighbors. Local mutual aid, that's Lodgemarket.
home.whyTrustDescription: Neighbor profiles and integrated messaging. Trust is the foundation of mutual aid.
home.geolocationDescription: Interactive map to find equipment near you
home.readyToStartSubtitle: Join the community and start renting or offering equipment today.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Access your Lodgemarket account
login.accountCreated: Your account has been created successfully! You can now sign in.
login.accountCreatedConfirm: Your account has been created! Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
login.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully! You can now sign in.
login.sessionError: Error establishing session. Please try again.

announcements.noResultsDescription: No equipment matches your criteria. Try modifying your filters.
announcements.publishSubtitle: Share your equipment with the community
announcements.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your equipment, its condition, its use...
announcements.specificRulesPlaceholder: Ex: Return within 48h, indoor use only...
announcements.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
announcements.addAtLeastOnePhoto: Please add at least one photo
announcements.handoverInfo: Hand-to-hand exchange. Payment and handover are done directly between individuals, off-platform.

messages.title: Messages
messages.noConversationsDescription: Contact an owner from an announcement to start exchanging
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation? It will be hidden for you but will remain visible to the other person.
